Check git status for uncommitted changes

input.command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
feat(health): add detailed health endpoint with database and cache status

Add comprehensive health monitoring endpoint at GET /api/health/detailed that provides:
- Overall system health status (healthy/degraded/unhealthy)
- Database connectivity and response time
- Redis cache connectivity and response time  
- Application uptime tracking
- Version information

Implementation follows existing FastAPI patterns:
- Pydantic models for type-safe responses
- Individual health check functions for each component
- Response time measurements in milliseconds
- Proper error handling with degraded/unhealthy states

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
